name: legal-builder-hub
description: Finds, evaluates, and installs community legal skills — with a security review gate before anything lands in your environment.

interface.shortDescription: Finds, evaluates, and installs community legal skills — with a security review gate before anything lands in your environment.
interface.longDescription: Finds, evaluates, and installs community legal skills — with a security review gate before anything lands in your environment. Migrated for Codex as a repo-scoped plugin. V1 supports local files and pasted text by default; remote connectors must be configured separately.
defaultPrompt: Use Legal Builder Hub with local files or pasted text.
